mapper.select:
select tc.*, AVG(ts.score) as industry_average, ROUND(VAR_SAMP(ts.score),2) as varianceValue from test_case tc left join test_state ts on tc.id = ts.testcase_id and ts.test_status = 1 where 1=1 and tc.scenario_id!=6
AND tc.function_id = #{query.functionId}
and tc.testcase_content LIKE CONCAT("%", #{query.testcaseContent}, "%")
GROUP by tc.id
HAVING varianceValue
>= truncate(#{query.varianceValue},2) <= truncate(#{query.varianceValue},2) > truncate(#{query.varianceValue},2) < truncate(#{query.varianceValue},2) = truncate(#{query.varianceValue},2)
select DISTINCT Max(scenario_task) from test_case where scenario_id = #{scenarioId} and scenario_task LIKE concat(#{firstly},"%")
select DISTINCT Max(task_detail) from test_case where scenario_id = #{scenarioId} and task_detail LIKE concat(#{firstly},"%")
SELECT a.id, a.testcase_content, a.task_detail FROM `test_case` a WHERE a.scenario_id=6
select id from test_case where task_detail=#{taskDetail}
SELECT a.plan_detail_name, b.sub_id, b.tertiary_metric, b.testcase_content FROM plan_detail a, test_case b WHERE a.id = b.function_id AND b.scenario_id !=6

SELECT a.beeeval_case_id, b.score FROM pcafe_relevancy_domain_index a, test_state b, vehicle c, test_record e WHERE a.case_id = b.testcase_id AND c.id = e.vehicle_id AND e.id = b.record_id AND e.id = #{recordId}

select b.plan_detail_name function_domain, a.tertiary_metric domain_index FROM test_case a, plan_detail b WHERE a.scenario_id !=6 AND a.function_id = b.id GROUP BY b.plan_detail_name, a.tertiary_metric
